raw_input:
[5.0/5] great item, totally worth the price, no smell After reading some of the reviews on this item, I was wary of buying this item, but I'm glad I took a chance because the item really does live up to its promise to help organize your purse. The item is made of durable, quality material, and I can see it holding up for years to come. The price compared to other purse organizers is much more economical and I like that it has a bottom-it makes switching purses much faster than if I had to fish out the organizer and then move my loose items.

A concern listed in a couple of the other reviews is that the organizers smell-I did not encounter that at all, and I'm very sensitive to smells. The smaller organizer fits into my standard size purses and really does help keep me organized. I wish some of the pockets were of a different size, but overall the organizer fits my needs and I'm very, very glad I took a chance on this item.

I bought it through Amazon instead of the TV offer so I didn't have to worry about sneaky S&H charges etc, and as a minimalist, I only need one set, not two, and I certainly didn't need their "special bonus gift". [2.0/5] Not too practical I found the Kangaroo Keeper locally, so didn't have to pay the exorbitant shipping they want online. Nice idea but it falls flat. Or rather it falls in a bunch unless you keep it stuffed with tall items. I knew about this flaw from reading reviews so I bought it with the intention of reinforcing with coat hanger wire. Now mine has a frame to hold it UP (the way it LOOKS in the pictures!) and a frame around the top to keep it open. It took me a good hour to do this upgrade, but now I can use purses that I was about to throw away because they're too deep (and dark) to find things. I say, don't bother with this item. It looks like there are better designed ones out there. [2.0/5] Odor Terrible / # of Pockets Great What a shame it has such a strong odor as many other reviewers have said as well. Its overall design, size (I have the large) is great and functional, but I am going to have to take the loss and buy another all due to its odor whichcan't be healthy for us to be smelling! [1.0/5] poor product! Was excited to see this on sale at a local store. I was happy and excited but was quickly disappointed. Product "large" holder is so small it is funny. Also none of my items (cell phone, check book, etc) fit into the pockets inside the carrier. Hence, product does not live up to advertisement. Don't buy it! [5.0/5] Great We ordered two of these for our trip to Alaska this fall and they were better then we expected. They kept items organized in our backpacks they we kept with through the whole trip. I used mine to keep track of my medications that I need to take everday. [1.0/5] Great idea. Smelly Product. i like the idea of this product. I would like it to be a bit wider. The draw strings are hard to pull. The worst part is that it smells terrible! I'm returning it. [1.0/5] Useless.. dangerous strings..needless strings..not even straps A total waste of money...way to flimsy and cheaply made😠 very unimpressed! And why does it have 14 inch strings on each side on each bag??? Won't even give this away..garbage! [4.0/5] Keeper Keeps it All I bought this for my wife for Christmas to swap out with her MANY handbags.
PROS: Easy to organize all the little things.
CONS: Not good for even a medium deep purse as the edges keep falling in. You can get Velcro to hold in place, but kind of defeats the ease of use benefit. [5.0/5] fantastic buy!!!!! smell???? No way! Just got mine..I ordered a black and tan set. there was no toxic smell? I don't know where the reviews are from?? Possibly a competitor.. they are great organizers...I've had these before and I reluctantly Gave them away to my daughter in laws
this time I'm keeping them for myself!! I bought my first set about 12 years ago and they lasted so long.. they are still in great shape.. they came with a drawstring and no mini lights... These have no drawstrings... but have the light.. but them, you won't regret it.. [1.0/5] Has a strong odor of dry-cleaning fluid that won't go away I was using several smaller cosmetic-type zipper bags to move my things from purse to purse, so when I saw this product, it looked as though it would do the job a little more easily. I don't know if I'll ever be able to find that out, however, because the inserts have such a strong chemical odor that I do not want to put them into any of my purses. I've tried spraying them with Febreeze and setting them outside to air out, and I have also sent them through a machine wash with extra detergent, but the odor persists.

Perhaps over time, the smell will finally dissipate, but until then, I can't review the performance of the product. It's too bad, because the insert looks as though it would be quite useful... if only it didn't smell like a vat of dry-cleaning fluid. [2.0/5] Can't get past the odor! I purchased the Kangaroo Keeper at Walmart. I haven't tried to use it yet, because after two weeks of airing out, and febreezing, the chemical odor is still so strong, I won't put one in my purse. I thought perhaps Walmart got the "rejects" to sell, but after reading the other comments, I'm just grateful I can return mine, and not lose money on shipping charges. My recommendation is to purchase locally, and check the odor before buying. Personally, I will look for a different product. [1.0/5] Poor design and terrible odor The previous reviewer is right, there is a vinyl-like smell that is very strong. I have not had this item long enough to see if the odor goes away over time, but I will not keep the Kangaroo Keepers for a different reason. There are two different size organizers that I thought would be ideal for my purses. I have tried both sizes and found that the pockets that are built in to each bag are not the right sizes for most things that I have. A few things fit fine, but most items just don't fit. Nice idea, but not well executed. [5.0/5] Great product! I love this product! Mine is well made and came with no unpleasant odor.
Pays to see some things for yourself. I change handbags often and this has added some order to my life. [2.0/5] Too Flimsy I bought the Kangaroo Organizer and have used it for a month. It made out of very flimsy nylon not substantial enough to hold its shape. The inside pockets are random sizes and placements that make no sense.

this was a waste of my $$$ [1.0/5] Great idea. Smelly Product. i like the idea of this product. I would like it to be a bit wider. The draw strings are hard to pull. The worst part is that it smells terrible! I'm returning it. [5.0/5] Great Organizer I bought this organizer for my wife. She carries more things in her purse then a soldier preparing for overseas duty. The last time she cleaned it out she found things that had been missing for years. This organizer works great. [1.0/5] Don't bother to order this The "organizer" is very flimsy and does not stand up in your purse to help organize. It's a joke.... I gave my to Goodwill.....probably should have just thrown them in the trash [1.0/5] This product was too small to be of any use I bought this product at a local store that has an "As Seen on TV" section. It's always a trial and error with those products but I figured there was no way this could go wrong and I really, really need something to help organize my bags. I'm a "tote" girl rather than a purse girl but with tote's there's barely any pockets and everything is just loose on the bottom. I saw this and since it had a large and small size I thought it would be great. I got home took everything out of my bag and started trying to fit things into the pockets. Sure it can hold up to 70 items but they've got to be small so my checkbook didn't fit, I always carry a little spiral notebook (the little ones that are about the width of a checkbook or smaller), that didn't fit. Sure there were places for all my pens but that was about all I could fit in the pockets. Some of them even had elastic tops, totally misleading. I tried stretching to fit things in but you can stretch the top all you want, it's the rest of the pocket that actually matters. I'm going to be returning this as soon as possible.

Luckily, I didn't notice an odor otherwise I'd be a lot more upset. As it is, I'm out $10 bucks and 15 minutes of deciding whether to try it or not.

[[ASIN:B003XF8RWC KANGAROO KEEPER (Tan)]] [3.0/5] Good, but could be better I received the tan and black keepers. The tan is SOO much better because it allows you to see your items better. I don't like that it cannot stand on its own but you have to find the perfect bag to fit this. I use a large eyeglasses case in the large compartment to give it stability.

So far for the LARGE size it's the perfect fit for my Juicy Couture Daydreamer Tote.
The small versions are pretty useless so far. I don't have any bags that fit that size the way I'd like.
There are a lot of very small pockets (pens, mascara maybe) that aren't useful if you need to carry bigger items with you.

The smell is bad. VERY BAD! I almost returned it, but I gave it a chance, aired it out a bit and then placed in my bag. It's been over a month and the smell has tapered off. I can barely smell any odor at all. I can't understand why companies can't use plain old cotton or natural products! It can't be that much more expensive!

All in all, I would recommend the Tan, Large size for a little extra organization until I find something better suited for this. Ladies, also look into Jen Grover's Butler Bags. They are good for organization. [3.0/5] Kangaroo pockets from amazon The kangaroo pocket was recommended to me by a friend. The first time I tried to use one, I found that the pockets were so deep, I could not remove the items from them. The next thing I found was that the entire pocket would not stay in place inside my deep bag I use for a purse. I am going to try some two-sided velco patches to see if they will hold the pockets in place inside my bag. And I may have to do same with the pockets that are too deep. One item I like to be able to retrieve fast from inside my bag is my cell phone and its gets lost in all of the pockets.
But I do I have another big purse that has stiffer sides and it may work in that one. But I am glad I purchased them because I am sure I can make some adjustments to make them work. I do like big purses. Three stars.

response:
Kangaroo Keeper purse organizer. Mixed reviews. Here summary:

GOOD: Some buyers love product. Help organize purse. Easy switch bags. Durable for some. Good for tracking medications on trips. Tan color better than black - see items easier. Large size fit big totes well.

BAD SMELL: Many buyers complain strong chemical odor like dry cleaning fluid. Smell persist even after Febreeze, washing, airing outside. Some return product because smell. Smell maybe go away over time but take long.

TOO FLIMSY: Many say product not hold shape. Fall over in purse. Frame not stay open like pictures show. Nylon not substantial enough.

POCKETS WRONG SIZE: Pockets too small for normal items like checkbook, cell phone. Pockets too deep - hard retrieve items. Random pocket placement make no sense.

STRINGS BAD: Drawstrings hard pull. Some have long 14 inch strings hang out bag.

PRICE: Cheaper buy local store or Amazon than TV offer - TV have sneaky shipping charges.

OVERALL: Good idea, bad execution. Smell biggest problem. Many return product. If buy, buy local so can smell first and return easy. Large tan version get best reviews. Small version mostly useless.
